mapper.sql: EVENT_ID AS eventId, USER_ID AS userId, EVENT_TYPE AS eventType, EVENT_STATUS AS eventStatus, RETRY_COUNT AS retryCount, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, SENT_AT AS sentAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EB_EVENT (EVENT_ID, USER_ID, EVENT_TYPE, EVENT_STATUS, RETRY_COUNT) VALUES (#{eventId}, #{userId}, #{eventType}, #{eventStatus}, #{retryCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE EB_EVENT SET EVENT_STATUS = #{eventStatus}, SENT_AT = CASE WHEN #{eventStatus} = 'SENT' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE SENT_AT END WHERE EVENT_ID = #{eventId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM EB_EVENT WHERE EVENT_STATUS = 'READY' ORDER BY CREATED_AT FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT FROM EB_EVENT
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT EVENT_STATUS AS eventStatus, COUNT(1) AS count FROM EB_EVENT GROUP BY EVENT_STATUS ORDER BY EVENT_STATUS
